feed.title: AO3 - Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: You're a running car, I'm a closed garage.
entry.summary:
Author: dylaesthetics

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,055Chapters: 3/10Kudos: 132

Summary: Dear Eddie,You probably have a lot of questions. I’ll get to answering them later. But first, let me paint you a picture.Imagine a little child, growing up in the depths of suburban Pennsylvania. They have no real friends, only their older sister. They have plenty of toys that were once said sister’s, including a collection of Barbies.Among these Barbies is a singular Ken. The child pays special attention to him. While their parents are wondering why the child isn’t obsessed with changing the Barbies into a thousand and one dresses, they take a pink marker and draw a birthmark on the side of Ken’s left eye. They keep Ken hidden from everyone else and only bring him out when no one’s around, to look at him long and hard, mesmerized.If you haven’t guessed yet, I am that child. ____OR Buck just wants to finally have an established partner in field at the 118. He doesn't expect the new hire to be the guy he'd dated back in college, before he dropped out and came out.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: I Fear This Might Be Love
entry.summary:
Author: whisperingcherries

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 24,278Chapters: 3/13Kudos: 14

Summary: Eddie Diaz has a perfectly reasonable explanation for everything.Buck is his best friend.That's why he's in Eddie's will.That's why Christopher loves him.That's why he's in every version of Eddie's future.That's why losing him feels unbearable.That's why seeing him date someone else feels a little like dying.Perfectly reasonable.Right?Or: Eddie Diaz has a sexuality crisis all thanks to the queen herself, Olivia Rodrigo.

entry.title: Three Of A Kind
entry.summary:
Author: Warlock_Nerd

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,857Chapters: 2/5Kudos: 77

Summary: What’s more pathetic than being in love with your best friend and co-parenting his kid with him then co-parenting your own kid with him in return?And what’s more pathetic than that then moving in together platonically so that the kids can have a better routine?And more pathetic than that is sharing a bed so that the two kids can have a room each?!And more more more more pathetic… how about adding a third child into the mix?***AKA - Buck and Eddie are still hopelessly in love with each other but too scared to make a move even after moving in and raising two kids together. So Destiny herself has had enough and made a plan to get these idiots together by magicking them a baby girl in the Safe Haven Baby Box.Enjoy :3

entry.title: Teosito
entry.summary:
Author: Juli_Christin

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 667Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 31

Summary: When Eddie had called to inform her that they would be bringing one more person to dinner Pepa’s thoughts went to the worst possible outcome, - Eddie had a girlfriend again. But when she opened the door she was met with Eddie, Chris and a very “Buck” looking four year old. Or Pepa meets Theo for the first time.

entry.title: The Buck-et list
entry.summary:
Author: goldenbuck118

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,505Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 86

Summary: After a close call on a rescue, Buck realizes there are too many things he's been putting off for someday.So he makes a list.Some items are easy:Learn more of Bobby's recipes.Take Theo camping.Learn to surf.See the Northern Lights.Some are harder:Go to therapy.Tell people he loves them.Figure out what Eddie means to him. One checked box at a time, Buck begins rebuilding a life shaped by grief, healing, family, and the terrifying realization that the thing he's been looking for might have been standing beside him all along. Or: Buck makes a bucket list, Theo adopts it as a personal project, the 118 become emotionally invested against their will, and Eddie Diaz ends up being both the problem and the solution.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: we found love in a hopeless place (reddit)
entry.summary:
Author: beetlesandstars

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,930Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 126

Summary: Unknown number: Hey! It’s BuckLike Buckaroo69But just BuckYou don’t have to include the 69 Eddie: You mean your legal name doesn’t include the number 69? Buck: Haha. No. I mean my real name is Evan Eddie: Why Buck? Buck: It’s my last name. Buckley Eddie: Now who has a slim grasp on internet safety, Evan Buckley? Buck: Okay, do as I say, not as I doOr: Buck doles out the worst - but well-meaning - advice in the world. Eddie, naturally, listens.

entry.title: a friend like you (could be the end of me)
entry.summary:
Author: phillipa_gordon

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,269Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 27

Summary: Eddie’s been hiding this part of himself for so long that he’d kind of hoped every visible trace of it had been erased from his being.Then every man and his dog in a podunk town clocks him. OR Buck and Eddie’s road trip back to California after they’re released from hospital in New Mexico.

entry.title: say something
entry.summary:
Author: EndlessRain

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 27,986Chapters: 6/7Kudos: 237

Summary: “I just thought you guys were married like My Dad and My Mommy,” Theo said with a sigh. He sipped his juice thoughtfully. “I miss them.”  Eddie and Theo and Chris and Buck work through the shape of their new family.

entry.title: Where Equipment Failure Leads
entry.summary:
Author: SociallyAwkwardWeirdo25

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 50,531Chapters: 9/9Kudos: 73

Summary: Buck knew B Shift had been rough on the gear, it was mentioned during hand over, but he hadn't expected only one working harness for a cliffside rescue. Or anything that came after the harness snapped and he fell to the water below. But how was he to expect a Pod of man-hating Mermaids or that they couldn't just let him leave?   What was that about a Moon Pool?

entry.title: Leave me alone.
entry.summary:
Author: Ghost_with_no_sleep

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,795Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 5

Summary: It’s like the normal 9-1-1 plot but different. Very fast paced (but only for the first chapter), and the difference is monsters exist. Eddie is a werewolf, Ravi is a vampire and Tommy is a werewolf. All three of them fall in love with Buck and get possessive / territorial over him. Buck doesn’t know any of them are monsters (yet).

entry.title: capture the flag
entry.summary:
Author: paleredheadinascifi

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,772Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 542

Summary: “I have a rainbow one! And a blue and green one! And a pink, purple, and blue one! And a blue and pink on! And this one is pink and orange! And - -”“That’s a lot of flags, Spider-Man,” Eddie chuckles.“Yep! I got them all. I have so many. Buck only has one. Which one do you have?”“I don’t have a flag,” Eddie says. "I'm not sure which one belongs to me right now." Or, Theo collects all the flags at Pride. Eddie tries to find one that fits.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: goodnight, anyway
entry.summary:
Author: madforyou

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,016Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 223

Summary: Eddie's hand lifts again, helpless, hauled forward by a gravity neither of them ever managed to bury, like he can't stop it, like whatever's been pulling him toward Buck never once got told it's over. Fingers reaching for Buck's face like the door might still hang open by a crack. Buck steps away before it can reach him. He backs the full width of the kitchen this time and folds his arms over himself, bracing against a blow that's already a part of him. "Don't," he croaks. "You don't get to almost have me. You don't get to reach across this space like it doesn’t hold the memory of me belonging to you. You traded that away the morning you decided I wasn't worth staying for. And I get it, Eddie. You had to go, for Chris. I know. But for fucks sake. I would have come with you. I would’ve—" There it is. The thing he never let himself admit. I would’ve come with you. You never asked. I’d’ve followed you across the country without a second of hesitation, and you decided I was easier to leave behind than to bring along. “I would’ve said yes to anything. But you didn’t ask.” Or,Buck and Eddie hook up before he leaves for El Paso. Four months later, Eddie comes back with a girlfriend.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: They say pain is an illusion, This is just a bruise, and You are just confused, but I am only human
entry.summary:
Author: FairyTailDragonKing

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 66,779Chapters: 11/?Kudos: 139

Summary: Buck finds something in hopes to reconnect with Christopher and slowly reconnect with Eddie and the rest of the 118 after dropping the lawsuit and being iced out. What happens when what he finds makes his life so much worse in ways no one can even understand or realize until it's too late?

entry.title: Title Fight
entry.summary:
Author: EmoRugs

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,920Chapters: 2/16Kudos: 7

Summary: Buck stood up, getting ready to stretch his legs, when the doors to the gym swung open and in walked none other than Eddie. Fucking. Diaz. "You've gotta be kidding me," Buck mumbled to himself. He clenched his fists, moving in long strides to where Eddie and the coach were now greeting each other. "Buck, perfect timing," said Coach Simpson, waving him over. "You'll be partnered with Eddie during this camp." Buck's face immediately scrunched up. "Is that even allowed? He's my opponent." "Who better to train with than someone you've already met in the ring?" It was entirely possible that Buck died the day he faced Sal Deluca, and he was now in hell. "Perk up, Buckley." Eddie chimed in, like the cherry on top of a burnt, moldy cake. "I'm not that bad of a partner." Then he winked at Buck. The bastard actually winked at him.OR; Buck gets injured due to unfortunate circumstances in the ring and must crawl his way back to the top to reclaim his title. But a corrupt system keeps dragging him down.

entry.title: Pre-Texas, Post-Texas, and Present-Texas
entry.summary:
Author: XxCasxX

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,941Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 72

Summary: "Yeah. Yes. Sorry. Just- There's a birthday party that they've been planning for next month or so and they want to know if we can make it." Eddie runs his hands over his face, taking a breath."Whose birthday?" Buck asks. He is mainly focused on the road."Tia Pepa and Abuela. It's a joint party. I don't know though, we were just there and -""I would want to go, dad." Chris chimes in. Recently, Buck knows they have been working on being more open about their communication and that has led to Buck somehow also being privy to that. He's been there for a few important conversations but he cant help but feel like an intruder but then there are times where they both look to him for support before saying their piece. It's stirs up some mixed feelings."I know mijo but I'm just not sure.""Come on, dad. Buck can come with us."orA couple months after Eddie and Christopher moved back to LA, Buck joins them for a trip back to Texas for a birthday party. While there, Eddie starts to open up giving glimpses into what his life was like in the past.

entry.title: Nosy Students Know Something
entry.summary:
Author: Diamia76

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,122Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 264

Summary: “Oh , come on you guys,” Buck reasons with the majority of the class who are still looking at him like he’s crazy, “A five question quiz on rocks and minerals can't be that bad. Aren’t some of you in AP US history? Now that's a groan worthy quiz.” He gets a few chuckles for that. Win number two. Towards the middle of the room Charlie raises her hand. "I have a proposal," she says and Buck's confidence wavers. "Hear me out." Leaning one hip against the edge of his desk, Buck closes his eyes for a second and breathes deeply. With a wave of his hand, he tells her to go on. "How about for every question we get right on here," she taps the half sheet of paper in front of her, "you let us ask you a question!" He should’ve known better. These specific 14 year old's are going to be the death of him, aren’t they. OR Buck is a science teacher. Eddie is a gym teacher. Their students have a lot of questions.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
